parameters: -----------回想登録ない、その場で起こすイベ---------
BGM音量を50までフェードアウト
Ah! Tool Shop old woman...! Long time no see, I'm \n[1]!
...? Oh, \n[1]! Long time no see! You look well~! That's great!
Yes...you look as energetic as ever, old woman.

Haha, calling this old lady "old woman"...in this village, only \n[1] would do that!
Really...I wish those other stupid men would learn a thing or two...!

Ahaha... By the way...you weren't at the shop during the day. Could it be that you've
also been going to the lord's mansion?

That's right, spot on! There are lots of craftsmen from outside the village over
there, you know! And they all have more money than my poor husband! Man, it's a huge
profit!

Oh, that's right! Is Dario doing okay? He's not being treated badly over there or
anything, is he...?

Hmm? Well...he seemed pretty worn out. He kept complaining, saying he wanted to come
home soon~!

Well! From my perspective, I'd like him to keep working over there forever! Sorry to
everyone else, but I'd prefer to keep doing business over there indefinitely!
...Maybe some trouble could happen and delay the construction, huh?
Th-that would be a problem! I wouldn't be able to see Dario anymore...!

...Well, if that really happened, I'd actually be in trouble too, you know? The
current situation isn't all good news...

Just look at the state of this shop! I can't even manage the stock or organize
anything properly! I don't even know what's in which pile of these wooden crates!

It's true, the shelves are empty too... And...the whole shop is covered in dust,
customers can't even come in like this...

Exactly~! I'm tied up with business over there during the day~! I don't have time to
clean up this place~!

I see... In that case, let me help you! The village chief told me to help everyone in
the village.
Oh! Are you sure!? That'd be a huge help! As expected of \n[1]! You're so reliable!
完了までウェイト = false

...And then, who knows how many hours passed........ No matter how much I cleaned,
there was no end to it. I carried out piles of trash and sorted through the massive
number of wooden crates to identify and display the merchandise that was still
intact...

To be honest, while regretting a little that I'd taken on more than I could handle, I
somehow managed to finish the cleaning before dawn...
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = Ch1_Nig_SP00
